item.title: About me
item.description: As a first-year master’s student at Maastricht University, Netherlands, I study Data Science for Decision Making. My field of interest includes text mining and NLP techniques, thus in my current master research project, I focus on an NLP task to transfer the styles of texts with a team of five amazing fellow students. Before my studies, I worked as a data analyst at shopping24 in Hamburg for several years. There I gained experiences with building a company-wide data lake, making this data available in the form of insightful analyses and Tableau dashboards for all teams, and setting up apache airflow.
